Alyssa Blackwood was a noblewoman from House Blackwood, and the fourth wife of Lord Walder Frey.[2]

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Recent Events
    • 2.1 A Dance with Dragons
  • 3 Family
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Alyssa married Walder Frey after his third wife, Lady Amarei Crakehall, died in 264 AC.[2][3] Alyssa and Walder had five children together: Lothar, Ser Jammos, Ser Whalen, Morya, and Tyta Frey.[2]

Recent Events[ ]

A Dance with Dragons[ ]

Lord Tytos Blackwood mentioned to Ser Jaime Lannister that his son Lucas was slain at the Red Wedding, even though Lord Walder's fourth wife had been a Blackwood. He notes that kinship counts for nothing at the Twins, no more than guest right.[4]

Family[ ]

It is unknown how Alyssa is related to the other known Blackwoods.
